title: Location

locationID.description: Unique identifier (UUID v5 from coordinates if provided, else UUID v4). Maps to dwc:locationID.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier auto-generated from name (lowercase, hyphenated).

decimalLatitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Maps to dwc:decimalLatitude.

decimalLongitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Maps to dwc:decimalLongitude.

coordinateUncertaintyInMeters.description: Uncertainty radius in meters. Maps to dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters.

geodeticDatum.description: Geodetic datum (default WGS84). Maps to dwc:geodeticDatum.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Maps to dwc:countryCode.

locality.description: Specific location description. Maps to dwc:locality.

habitat.description: Habitat types present at location. Maps to dwc:habitat.

extensions.description: Tool-specific extensions. Keys must be namespaced: namespace.fieldName.

description: Geographic location record. Maps to Darwin Core Location class (dwc:Location).
